app.name: XKeen Control Panel
app.conn_error_desc: Please check your network connection or reload the page.
auth.setup_desc: Set password to access the control panel
auth.password_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
dash.title: System Status
dash.welcome: Overview of services, resources and quick actions.
dash.problems.invalid_config_desc: A syntax error has been detected in the active Xray or Mihomo configuration. Please check configuration files in the editor.
dash.problems.mihomo_api_desc: The control panel cannot connect to Mihomo API. Proxy services might not work correctly.
dash.problems.kernel_missing_desc: No kernels (Xray or Mihomo) are currently installed. Please install a kernel in the services management section.
dash.problems.kernel_crash_desc: The selected active kernel ({kernel}) is stopped, although the XKeen service is running.
dash.problems.disk_low_desc: Less than {free} of free space remaining on /opt. This may disrupt services.
dash.problems.ssl_expire_desc: Web panel SSL certificate will expire in {days} days. Please renew it.
dash.quickstart.title: Quick Start
editor.title: Service Management
editor.subtitle: Start, stop and restart XKeen and Mihomo
editor.h1_sub: YAML / JSON configs with highlighting, schema validation, and autocomplete.
editor.empty_state_body: Open a configuration file from the left sidebar to start editing or viewing backups.
editor.restore_confirm: Restore backup? Remember to save after restoring.
editor.unsaved_warning: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?
editor.mihomo_autoedit_body: On subscription refresh this config.yaml is rewritten by the panel. Manual edits outside the proxies/proxy-groups blocks are preserved, but changes inside managed blocks may be overwritten. Disable all active subscriptions or take a backup before editing manually.
editor.yaml_inserted: Configuration inserted into editor. Remember to save it!
editor.select_file_warn: Please select a file in the left panel to insert YAML.
editor.generator_subtitle: Build proxy, proxy-group, rules, DNS and TUN without hand-editing YAML.
editor.constructor_merge_warning_body: The following manual settings will be automatically preserved: {keys}
editor.constructor_subtitle: Visual generator for Xray and Mihomo
preset.selective-routing.desc: Private IPs direct, ads blocked, rest through proxy.
preset.all-proxy-routing.desc: Private IPs direct, all other traffic through proxy.
preset.selective-no-quic.desc: Block UDP 443 (QUIC), ads blocked, rest through proxy.
preset.minimal-routing.desc: Private IPs direct, all other ports direct.
preset.rule-based.desc: Basic Mihomo preset: single Selective group with auto-inclusion of proxies.
preset.global-proxy.desc: All traffic through proxy, except private subnets.
preset.zkeen-selective.desc: Advanced CIS preset with 16 proxy groups divided by services.
preset.only-blocked-routing.desc: Route only blocked resources through proxy.
preset.only-blocked.desc: Route only blocked resources through proxy.
editor.requires_zkeen_geodata: Requires zkeen geosite.dat for this preset
editor.dns_intercept_warning: DNS Interception is disabled in XKeen. Client routing will not bypass blocks until interception is enabled.
editor.dns_over_vless_desc: Redirect DNS queries from the inbound connection dns-in through a proxy to prevent DNS leaks.
editor.apply_confirm_body: Are you sure you want to apply the configuration changes and restart the core?
editor.apply_timeout: Service did not start in time. Check logs.
editor.proxy_tag_warning: Selected proxy outbound not found in available outbounds. Config saved, but routing may not work correctly.
editor.proxy_name_sanitized: Proxy name sanitized of special characters
editor.empty_proxies_warning: No proxy servers configured. The configuration might be broken!
editor.group_disable_warning: Disabling group {group} will remove routing rules for it!
svc.title: Service Management
svc.subtitle: Start, stop and restart routing and proxies
svc.xkeen_desc: Router firewall and routing management utility
svc.switch_confirm_msg: Switch from {from} to {to}? XKeen will restart with the new configuration.
svc.h1_sub: Manage XKeen module, Xray and Mihomo kernels, and updates.
svc.autostart_local_only: Settings are saved locally in the browser only and are not sent to the router — feature under development
svc.autostart_keenetic_desc: XKeen and all configured kernels will start automatically
svc.mihomo_api_unavailable_title: external-controller is missing in Mihomo config
editor.no_templates_hint: Click "Update templates" to load templates from the repository
editor.templates_update_error: Failed to update templates. Check your connection.
editor.no_file_for_template: Open a file to apply a template
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Control panel information
settings.snapshots_empty_desc: Create your first config snapshot or drag & drop a backup file (.tar.gz) here to upload
settings.snapshot_restore_confirm: Restore this snapshot? Current configuration files will be overwritten and active services will be restarted automatically.
settings.snapshot_restore_error: Failed to restore backup: {error}. Please check the archive integrity and try again.
settings.snapshot_delete_confirm: Delete snapshot: Are you sure you want to delete this config snapshot? This action is irreversible.
settings.backup_restore_confirm: Are you sure you want to restore this backup? The current file will be overwritten.
settings.backup_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this backup?
settings.backup_select_file_hint: Select a file to view backups
settings.notification_sound_desc: Toast notifications with a soft beep
settings.dev_mode_desc: Show diagnostic tools (parse summary, headers, raw response)
settings.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
settings.auth_bcrypt: Auth with bcrypt and HMAC sessions
settings.update_reconnecting: Waiting for new version to start
settings.update_reconnecting_sub: The page will automatically reload once the server is ready
settings.update_reconnect_timeout: New server did not respond within 60 seconds. Please reload the page manually (Ctrl+F5).
settings.templates_incompatible_warning: Schema version is not supported by the current control panel version. Please update the panel.
smartproxy.title: Smart Proxy
smartproxy.subtitle: Automatic proxy switching by schedule
smartproxy.no_profiles: No profiles. Add the first one.
smartproxy.name: Name
smartproxy.preset_workday_desc: VPN active during working hours Mon-Fri (09:00 - 18:00)
smartproxy.no_profiles_desc: Create your first scheduled profile to automatically switch proxies based on the time of day.
smartproxy.preset_night_desc: VPN proxy active only at night from 23:00 to 07:00
smartproxy.preset_always_desc: VPN proxy runs continuously 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
smartproxy.grid_paint_hint: Click and drag to easily paint or erase time intervals.
smartproxy.schedule_mode_hint: Schedule mode switches proxies based on the weekly grid setup.
trafficquotas.title: Traffic Quotas
trafficquotas.subtitle: Traffic accounting and consumption limits
trafficquotas.no_quotas: No quotas. Add the first one.
trafficquotas.name: Name
trafficquotas.banner_text: Traffic quotas allow you to automatically limit consumption or redirect traffic through DIRECT when the limit is reached globally or for a specific proxy.
trafficquotas.forecast_subtext: Projected usage by end of period
rules.title: Routing Rules
rules.subtitle: Active routing rules
traffic.title: Traffic
traffic.peak_load_desc: Maximum speed rates for hour, day, and week
traffic.reset_confirm: Reset statistics: Are you sure you want to reset statistics and all peak traffic values? This action is irreversible.
traffic.empty_state_body: Connecting to the proxy kernel metrics gathering service
dat.title: DAT Manager
dat.h1_sub: GeoIP and GeoSite databases for traffic filtering.
dat.subtitle: GeoIP / GeoSite files
dat.no_files: DAT files not found in /opt/etc/xray/dat/ or /opt/etc/mihomo/
console.title: XKeen Console
console.subtitle: Categorized XKeen commands
console.confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to run "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
editor.templates_desc: Select a pre-made template. Current file content will be replaced.
editor.confirm_template: Current file content will be replaced. Continue?
conn.title: Active Connections
conn.close_all_confirm: Are you sure you want to terminate all active connections?
net.title: Network Tools
net.subtitle: Ping, traceroute, DNS lookup, HTTP test
subscr.title: Subscriptions
subscr.subtitle: Manage proxy subscription links
subscr.name: Name
subscr.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this subscription?
subscr.hwid_locked_warning: Provider rejected HWID — stub nodes may appear instead of real ones
subscr.confdir_warning: XRay config directory not found ({dir}). Subscription fragment files will not be applied.
subscr.no_kernel_warning: You must select at least one kernel for integration
subscr.no_skips: No parsing errors detected. All lines processed successfully.
subscr.quality_full_tip: Provider returned full xray-json or clash format. All parameters (Reality, TLS, ALPN) are preserved.
subscr.quality_partial_tip: Provider returned base64 fallback. Some modern parameters might be lost.
subscr.nodes_preview_placeholder: Node list with metadata and health checks will be available in v0.15.0 after backend integration.
subscr.detail.auto_routing_conflict: Cannot set node manually in auto-balancing mode
subscr.import_link_placeholder: Paste one or more links (one per line)
subscr.import_error_single_only: Please enter only one link at a time
subscr.partial_map_warning: Some nodes were skipped (incompatible protocol or missing server settings)

logs.title: Logs
logs.h1_sub: Real-time output of XKeen and kernel system logs.
logs.no_filtered_logs: No logs found with this filter
logs.disconnected_desc: Lost connection to the WebSocket log server.
proxies.title: Proxies & Groups
proxies.subtitle: Proxy group management and latency testing
proxies.no_proxies: No proxies found. Check Mihomo configuration.
kernels.title: Kernel Manager
kernels.subtitle: Xray Core and Mihomo (Clash.Meta)
capabilities.mihomo_offline_desc: Proxies, connections and rules are unavailable. Start Mihomo or check settings.
capabilities.mihomo_empty_desc: Mihomo API is not responding. Go to Services to start Mihomo.
ds.empty.mihomo_offline_desc: Mihomo service must be running to view this page.
ds.empty.mihomo_offline_desc_actionable: Open Constructor → choose preset → apply config → restart Mihomo.
ds.empty.no_data_desc: There is currently no information to display here.
ds.empty.rules_empty_desc: The routing rules list is empty.
ds.empty.logs_empty_desc: Log file is empty or has not been populated yet.
ds.empty.load_timeout: Request timed out. Check that Mihomo is running and reachable.
apioffline.title: Mihomo API · offline
apioffline.desc: is not responding. Proxies, connections, and rules are unavailable until connection is restored.
svc.mihomo_stopped_warning: The Mihomo kernel is stopped. Start it in the Services section.
groups.use_providers_hint: Proxies from these Mihomo subscriptions will be available to the group
